items.host_position: Confirmed: refund totals used float arithmetic and drifted by a cent against the stored charge total. Reproduced with a failing unit test.
items.reviewer_position: process_refund computes totals with float instead of Decimal, causing off-by-a-cent mismatches.

verification.detail: Added a regression test that refunds $19.99 x 3 and asserts the stored total; it failed before the fix and passes after.

items.resolution: Switched the refund math to Decimal and rounded once at the boundary.

items.host_position: The gateway client enforces a 10s timeout and raises on failure; a nightly reconciliation job re-checks any row whose gateway state is unconfirmed. The reviewer only saw the diff, not the client construction.
items.reviewer_position: No timeout or exception handling is visible at the refund call site.

verification.detail: Timeout and error handling are set in GatewayClient.__init__ at config/gateway.py:14, outside the reviewed diff's window.
